      Creates a combined contract out of the passed atomic contracts.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableSet<FunctionalOperationContract> SpecificationRepository.getOperationContracts(KeYJavaType kjt, IProgramMethod pm)
      Returns all registered (atomic) operation contracts for the passed operation.
      ImmutableSet<FunctionalOperationContract> SpecificationRepository.getOperationContracts(KeYJavaType kjt, IProgramMethod pm, Modality modality)
      Returns all registered (atomic) operation contracts for the passed operation which refer to the passed modality.

      static ImmutableSet<FunctionalOperationContract> UseOperationContractRule.getApplicableContracts(UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst, Services services)

      Standard implementation of the OperationContract interface.

      FunctionalOperationContract ContractFactory.addGlobalDefs(FunctionalOperationContract opc, Term globalDefs)
      Add global variable definitions (aka.
      FunctionalOperationContract ContractFactory.addPost(FunctionalOperationContract old, InitiallyClause ini)
      Add the specification contained in InitiallyClause as a postcondition.
      FunctionalOperationContract ContractFactory.addPost(FunctionalOperationContract old, Term addedPost, ProgramVariable selfVar, ProgramVariable resultVar, ProgramVariable excVar, ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars)
      Returns another contract like this one, except that the passed term has been added as a postcondition (regardless of termination case).
      FunctionalOperationContract ContractFactory.addPre(FunctionalOperationContract old, Term addedPre, ProgramVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars)
      Returns another contract like this one, except that the passed term has been added as a precondition.
      FunctionalOperationContract ContractFactory.func(IProgramMethod pm, InitiallyClause ini)
      Create a new FunctionalOperationContract from an existing IProgramMethod and InitiallyClause.
      FunctionalOperationContract ContractFactory.func(java.lang.String baseName, IProgramMethod pm, boolean terminates, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> pres, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePres, Term mby, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> posts, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePosts, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> axioms, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> mods, java.util.Map<ProgramVariable,Term> accessibles, java.util.Map<LocationVariable,java.lang.Boolean> hasMod, ProgramVariableCollection pv)

    • Uses of FunctionalOperationContract in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.dl.translation

      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.dl.translation that return FunctionalOperationContract 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      FunctionalOperationContract DLSpecFactory.createDLOperationContract(java.lang.String name, Term fma, Term modifies)
      Creates an operation contract from an implication formula of the form "pre -> {heapAtPre := heap} [#catchAll(java.lang.Throwable exc){m();}]post", (where the update and/or the #catchAll may be omitted) and a modifies clause.

      Translate initially clause to a contract for the given constructor.
